title: Transaction Record Envelope (v6 §4.2)
description: K2 envelope extension carrying the v6 transaction-record shape per `packages/specs/rfcs/v6-substrate-synthesis.md` §4.2. Schema-additive at v3.0-alpha (per INV-K2-SchemaForwardCompat): v5.4 K2-v2 readers tolerate the new fields as unknowns; v3.0-alpha+ readers consume them per A9 two-phase commit semantics. Round-3e GP4 reclassification: DERIVED-VIEW-INVALIDATE is informational (commit_outcome NOT_APPLICABLE), not state-changing. Round-3d delta 7: abort_detail field added for K9-rejection diagnostics.

prev_state_hash.description: Chain edge to predecessor COMMITTED record; equals GENESIS_HASH for chain root (per §4.3). Edges-embedded-in-nodes design per §4.2 Round-3e (Gemini Flash CAS Rule 2).

post_state_hash.description: State hash after this transaction; null in phase-1 PENDING intent records (per §5.2 two-phase commit).

writer_persona_id.description: The persona that authored this transaction. Matches a persona contract in packages/runtime/personas/.

writer_spawn_id.description: The spawn that performed the work. Format: sp-<ISO timestamp>-<persona-short>-<seq>.

parent_state_id.description: K3 lineage edge to the parent spawn-record. Null for root spawns (no parent in the K3 chain).

operation_class.description: CRUD taxonomy per §5a.1. CREATE/APPEND/SUPERSEDE/TOMBSTONE are state-changing (subject to A10 evidence_refs enforcement). DERIVED-VIEW-INVALIDATE is informational (Round-3e GP4 reclassification) — carries commit_outcome NOT_APPLICABLE and MAY have empty evidence_refs.

affected_records.description: Block IDs this transaction touches. For SUPERSEDE/TOMBSTONE, the predecessor records this entry replaces or marks removed.

evidence_refs.description: A10 evidence edges to kernel-emitted records that exist in the chain at prev_state_hash. Required non-empty for state-changing operation_classes (CREATE/APPEND/SUPERSEDE/TOMBSTONE) per A10; MAY be empty for DERIVED-VIEW-INVALIDATE. Bootstrap-exception sentinels per A10 (Round-3d Patch GPT-1.B): USER_INTENT_AXIOM:<sha256>, GENESIS_EVIDENCE:<schema_version>:<scope>, ROOT_TASK_RECORD:<task_id>.

schema_version.description: K2 envelope schema version. v2 = v5.4 baseline; v3+ = v6 transaction-record extension.

policy_version.description: Per INV-A6-PolicyVersionedReplay (v5.3). sha256 of the active policy-axioms snapshot at spawn-init. Schema-additive in v3.0-alpha; consumed by E3 in v3.3.

committed_at.description: Phase-2 timestamp; null while PENDING. ISO 8601.

commit_outcome.description: Two-phase commit state per §5.2. NOT_APPLICABLE classifies informational records (spawn-init, GC events, DERIVED-VIEW-INVALIDATE) that don't advance canonical state.

abort_reason.description: Populated for ABORTED/ROLLED-BACK; null otherwise. Canonical reasons per §5.4: k9-pre-commit-rejected, out_of_scope_writes_detected, out_of_scope_writes_tail_window, recovery-sweep-orphan, budget-exhausted.

idempotency_key.description: sha256(canonical_json({writer_persona_id, operation_class, content_hash, prev_state_hash})). Two records with same key are the same transaction; replay is no-op (§5a.6).

references_transaction_id.description: Round-2 Tension 6 / §5.2 phase-1 ↔ phase-2 linkage. Populated on commit-records pointing back to intent-record's transaction_id; null on intent-records and standalone records.

abort_detail.description: Round-3d delta 7 (persona-Maya M3 debuggability). Structured diagnostic block populated only when commit_outcome is ABORTED/ROLLED-BACK and a specific invariant violation triggered the abort. Schema-additive; older readers tolerate it.
